tasks.title: Body Removal
tasks.description: Clear the gas chambers after each operation.

tasks.title: Belongings Sorting
tasks.description: Sort clothing, valuables, and documents from the arriving transports.

tasks.title: Hair Processing
tasks.description: The hair is used for industrial purposes. You have learned not to think about this.

tasks.title: Krematorium Maintenance
tasks.description: Keep the facility operational. The SS demand efficiency above all.

tasks.title: Platform Duty
tasks.description: Direct arriving prisoners. Your presence reassures them. This is by design.

tasks.title: Pathological Autopsies
tasks.description: Document the effects of experiments and conditions. Your findings go to Berlin.

tasks.title: Specimen Preparation
tasks.description: Prepare specimens for Mengele's anatomical studies.

tasks.title: Medical Selection Assistance
tasks.description: Assist with the medical assessment portion of selection. Your role is clinical documentation.

tasks.title: Experiment Documentation
tasks.description: Record results from the twin studies and other research. Your medical expertise makes you essential.

tasks.title: Mass Mortality Documentation
tasks.description: The scale defies any medical framework you were trained in. You document it anyway.

tasks.title: Evidence Preservation
tasks.description: Quietly preserve records that could serve as post-war evidence. Risk: moderate.

tasks.title: Write the Chronicle
tasks.description: Your testimony, written and hidden with the manuscripts buried near Krematorium III.

upgrades.title: Extra Ration Allocation
upgrades.description: Your value to the SS has earned an additional daily ration.

upgrades.title: Improved Barracks Assignment
upgrades.description: Better sleep means better work. The SS care only about the second part.

upgrades.title: Applied Medical Knowledge
upgrades.description: Your professional training increases your efficiency and value.

upgrades.title: Compartmentalization
upgrades.description: You have learned to partition your mind. The cost of this skill is hidden for now.

upgrades.title: The Witness Mandate
upgrades.description: You survive to testify. This purpose steadies you.
